title: PlayerIntensify
description: A quite useful item enhancement plugin for players
body:
![Core Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Core%20Support-Spigot|Folia-blue)
![Version Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version%20Support-1.15.x--26.x-blue)
![Paid](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paid-No-blue)
![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fricedoc.handyplus.cn%2Fversion.json&query=%24.PlayerIntensify&prefix=v&label=Latest%20Version)

### 1. Introduction

> PlayerIntensify – A quite useful item enhancement plugin for players  
> Dedicated to my 10-year DNF journey~

![PlayerIntensify](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/plugin/PlayerIntensify/1.webp)

1. Supports enhancing various items: all swords, netherite axes, bows, netherite gear, tridents, shields, etc.  
2. Supports MySQL and local SQLite storage for player enhancement data.  
3. Faithfully recreates DNF elements: Cubic Titanium, Advanced Cubic Titanium, Protection Scrolls, Enhancement Titles, +12 Enhancement Coupons, etc.  
4. Configurable material display lore and customizable enhancement probabilities.  
5. Multiple Cubic Titanium acquisition methods - mob kills, mining, fishing with fully customizable rates and anti-farm mechanisms.  
6. PlaceholderAPI variable support.  
7. Comprehensive API for extending enhancement probability systems.  
8. Uses furnaces for enhancement for immersive gameplay.  
9. Server-wide notifications for high-level enhancements.  
10. More features detailed in this wiki.  
11. Plugin prohibits hot-reloading.  
12. Customizable enhancement items (3.2.0+).
